title: Industrial Foregoing: Additional
body:
![Industrial Foregoing Additional](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a4b83ca16471cd3e133e9c4201f80fc51699a89_0.webp)
**This is an addition to the Industrial Foregoing mod!**
---
### New mechanics:
- **Factory Constructor**
  - A machine for creating new machines :)
 
- **Upgraded Constructor**
  - Creating level 5 addons!
  
- **Repaire Machine**
  - Restores items at the expense of energy and experience!
  
- **Polishing Machine**
  - Polishes crystals (diamonds, amethysts, emeralds)!
  
- **Solidifier**
  - Turns liquids into solids(water into snow, lava into obsidian, and more)!
  
---
### New Addons
- **Efficiency** 3, 4 and 5!
  
- **Processing** 3, 4 and 5!
  
- **Speed** 3, 4 and 5!
  
### Photo with all (almost) new items and blocks:
---
![New](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6c04c2e2c7d6e052c441d575eb9441594e6f710.png)
